positive: A whimsical, highly stylized nocturnal jungle scene. Focus on a central arrangement of exaggerated tropical flora and fauna silhouettes: giant, stylized pitcher plants, bioluminescent glowing moths, curling tropical vines, and a playfully curved, majestic moon. The composition should be symmetrical and highly graphic, using deep indigo, electric turquoise, lime green, and glowing coral accents. Style is a mix of Art Nouveau and bold, modern graphic illustration. Strong contrast is essential, with the subjects appearing as clean, black silhouettes against a deep, vibrant gradient background, emphasizing negative space for print appeal. Cinematic, high contrast, flat vector quality, no gradients in solid areas. Suitable for a t-shirt print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, cropped, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grainy, photography, realism, 3d render
